LayoutObject.name: HTML Close
Value string 1
WV
Tag-Score-Condition buttons Copy
tab1b Copy2

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab1" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))

LayoutObject.name: tab2b Copy2

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab2" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))

LayoutObject.name: tab3b Copy2

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab3" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: The AI ouput from this prompt will be stored in this text variable. The text variable will be generated when used in a page item text.
